intro: Sinomalus muliensis, also known as the Chinese mulberry plant, is a type of plant used in traditional medicine, belonging to the family Annonaceae. The plant has been reported to possess various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its potential in treating conditions such as diabetes, cardiovascular disease, and certain types of cancer. The bioactive constituents of Sinomalus muliensis include alkaloids, terpenoids, and flavonoids, which have been identified as the primary contributors to its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infused in teas, or made into a tincture, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
